title: bauhinia bohniana
intro: Bauhinia bohniana, also known as the 'Mountain Bauhinia' or 'Red Bauhinia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India, China, and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of alkaloids and flavonoids. Bauhinia bohniana is also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
